name: Scope 1 GHG emissions
businessDefinition:
Scope 1 greenhouse gas emissions, namely emissions generated from sources that are controlled by the company that issues the underlying assets (equity share approach preferably used). See also Regulation (EU) 2016/1011 Annex III (1)(e)(i).
Linked to Regulation (EU) 2022/1288, Annex I, Table 1, Adverse sustainability indicators 1, 2, 3
